title: Besleria quitensis
intro: Besleria quitensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Gesneriaceae, commonly known as the Quitensis besleria or Quitensis gesneria. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine, exhibiting potential health benefits such as anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments including wounds, fever, and respiratory issues. The bioactive constituents of Besleria quitensis include alkaloids, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Besleria quitensis is often prepared as a tea or infusion, as well as being used in the form of a decoction or tincture, to take advantage of its health-promoting effects.
